title: Implement real Facial identity gate and model provenance
operator_request: Facial’s identity gate is a backbone need for LoRA mining. MT-019 only records proxy identity keys, so real optional model-backed identity must be added without fake success states.

state_recovery.recovery_rule: Model-backed identity is optional and configuration-driven. Never hardcode D: model paths; never emit match/verdict success unless the configured model was loaded and recorded with SHA-256 provenance.

scope.summary: Add optional real YuNet/ArcFace/PIPNet-backed identity analysis with model provenance, degraded no-model behavior, and LoRA-ready identity gate artifacts.
base_scope: Add model configuration discovery for detector/embedder/landmark assets without hardcoded absolute paths.
Implement no-model degraded path that is explicit and testable.
When configured, load model files through native Rust code and record model SHA-256, source family, thresholds, and version/config values.
Emit face boxes, detector confidence, face fraction, sharpness, yaw/landmark fields when available, embedding provenance, and identity gate verdicts.
Keep proxy fields from MT-019 only as fallback/degraded compatibility, never as real identity proof.
acceptance_criteria: No fake identity match verdicts are emitted in no-model mode.
identity_source becomes real only after configured model load succeeds.
Rows include model SHA-256, detector source, threshold, face box/frac/score, sharpness, yaw, and landmark-derived fields when available.
No D: or user-profile model path is hardcoded in product code or tests.
Real-model smoke tests are env-gated and skipped by default when model files are absent.
risks_and_controls: Risk: model dependency bloats build or breaks non-Windows targets. Control: keep model runtime optional/configured and test no-model path by default.
Risk: identity gate falsely rejects useful training data. Control: record thresholds and raw scores, keep decisions reversible, and avoid destructive actions.
Risk: provenance drift makes old artifacts unusable. Control: persist model hashes and config in every identity artifact.
verification: Model config validation and SHA-256 provenance tests.
Env-gated ignored smoke test for real local model assets when operator provides paths.

manual_requirement: Required if this MT exposes or changes operator/model-visible Facial behavior.
